title: PDF Receipt Generation for Crypto Stores: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Payment confirmed, receipt generated, download link sent — all within 30 seconds. The fully automated digital product pipeline.

content.text: If you're a digital creator from Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, you know that PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad can be a minefield. Without a local bank account, your customers can't complete payments, and you'll miss out on sales. What if you could sell digital products without relying on these platforms? Introducing the Core Shop Engine, the automated digital product delivery system that lets you sell and deliver your creations instantly, without PayPal required.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

The Core Shop Engine is a backend system that automates digital product delivery, using webhooks to connect with your payment processor. This means no more manual fulfillment failures or delayed deliveries. When a customer buys your digital product, the payment processor sends a notification (webhook) to the Core Shop Engine, which then immediately delivers the product to the customer's email. This seamless process ensures your customers get what they paid for, and you get paid on time.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Core Shop Engine pipeline involves several key components. First, the payment processor (NOWPayments) sends a webhook notification to the Core Shop Engine when a payment is received. The Core Shop Engine then verifies the payment and generates a PDF receipt, which is sent to the customer's email. Next, the Core Shop Engine triggers automated delivery of the digital product, which is stored on a secure server. This ensures instant access for your customers, and you can focus on creating more content.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Core Shop Engine is designed for solo developers and digital creators who want to sell digital products directly to their customers. If you're restricted from using PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad due to geographic or banking limitations, this system gives you the freedom to sell and deliver your creations globally. By integrating the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend, you can enable customers to pay with multiple cryptocurrencies, such as BTC, ETH, USDT, and SOL.
The Core Shop Engine automates digital product delivery using webhooks, ensuring seamless customer experiences and timely payments.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine is powered by NOWPayments, a cryptocurrency payment processor that supports over 300 coins. The Web3 Wallet Connect frontend provides a seamless payment experience for your customers, allowing them to pay with their preferred cryptocurrencies. The Admin Dashboard offers real-time analytics and transaction logs, giving you complete control over your store. By integrating these components, you can create a fully automated digital product store that runs smoothly, even at high volumes.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with the Core Shop Engine, follow these steps: (1) Configure the payment processor (NOWPayments) and frontend (Web3 Wallet Connect); (2) Set up the Admin Dashboard and integrate it with the Core Shop Engine; (3) Upload your digital products to the secure server; (4) Test your store with a sample transaction; and (5) Launch your store and start selling your digital products. Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see the Core Shop Engine in action.
How does automated digital product delivery work?

Can I automatically send download links after crypto payment? Yes, with the Core Shop Engine, you can automate digital product delivery using webhooks. When a customer pays with cryptocurrency, the payment processor sends a notification to the Core Shop Engine, which then delivers the digital product to the customer's email.
The Web3 Wallet Connect frontend enables customers to pay with multiple cryptocurrencies, such as BTC, ETH, USDT, and SOL.

If you're looking for a way to integrate your Web3 Wallet Connect frontend with a cryptocurrency payment processor, the Core Shop Engine is a great choice. This system also supports instant automated delivery of digital products, making it a perfect solution for creators who want to sell and deliver their creations quickly. Check out our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see the Core Shop Engine in action.

To set up your Core Shop Engine store, follow these steps: (1) Configure the payment processor (NOWPayments) and frontend (Web3 Wallet Connect); (2) Set up the Admin Dashboard and integrate it with the Core Shop Engine; (3) Upload your digital products to the secure server; (4) Test your store with a sample transaction; and (5) Launch your store and start selling your digital products.
